calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Continued To Aug-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel C. Zamora, Esq. appeared for plaintiff California Pacific Bank.
Alan Chi, Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant David Lee.
Default entered against defendant on July 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff California Pacific Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant David Lee as follows:

Damages/Principal - $68,673.05.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,056.10.
Attorney's Fees & Costs - $4,176.63, for a total of $80,905.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Continued To Jul-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
